title: Lodestone Warps
description: Use a lodestone compass to teleport back to the lodestone
body:
### How to Use

Hold a lodestone compass and an ender pearl at the same time, it doesn't matter which hand they are in. Then throw the ender pearl while standing on any lodestone and you will be teleported to the lodestone that your compass is linked to.

### Configuration

Use `/function clgd.lodestone:menu` to open the config menu

**Available Settings**
- Require lodestone: if set to true, the player must be standing on any lodestone to be able to warp
- Prevent fall damage: if set to true, the player will not take damage if they warp while falling

Note: Setting the maximum distance to be a negative number will remove the limit

### Limitations

You must be in the same dimension as the lodestone to be teleported. This is an intended feature but may become configurable in future versions.

Due to technical limitations, you can only travel a maximum distance of 46,340 in a single direction and a maximum L1 distance (manhattan distance) of 46,766 blocks from the lodestone when the distance limit is enabled.
